profile.name: Ravi Teja Arcot
profile.title: Analytics Engineer
profile.bio: Analytics Engineer and Data Engineer with 4+ years of experience building modern data platforms, analytics solutions, and cloud-based data pipelines using dbt, Snowflake, Python, SQL, Airflow, Databricks, Spark, Kafka, AWS, and Azure. I design scalable ETL/ELT pipelines, dimensional data models, and analytics-ready datasets that power executive reporting, financial analytics, self-service BI, and machine learning initiatives. My focus is data warehousing, cloud analytics, data governance, and data quality across the modern data stack, delivering trusted data solutions that both technical and business stakeholders rely on.
